title: ollama/ollama
summary: The official Ollama CLI and server that lets you run Llama 2, Mistral, Gemma and other large language models locally.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript client for Ollama, published on npm as 'ollama'.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python client for Ollama, published on PyPI as 'ollama'.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: LangChain integration for Ollama, available on PyPI inside langchain-community.

title: ollama-webui
summary: ChatGPT-style web UI for Ollama with model management, chat history and multi-user support.

title: ollama-cli
summary: A third-party interactive CLI for Ollama with prompt history and syntax highlighting.

title: ollama-copilot
summary: VS Code extension that brings local AI autocomplete powered by Ollama.

title: ollama4j
summary: Java/Kotlin client for Ollama published to Maven Central.

title: ollama-rb
summary: Community-maintained Ruby gem for Ollama.

title: ollama-chat
summary: Minimal React chat app example consuming the Ollama REST API.

title: ollama-haystack
summary: Haystack integration by deepset for using Ollama models in RAG pipelines.

title: ollama-discord
summary: Discord bot that lets servers chat with local models via Ollama.

title: ollama-slack
summary: Slack Bolt app that adds /ollama slash command for private LLM chats.

title: ollama-csharp
summary: Unofficial C# / .NET client for Ollama, published as NuGet package Ollama.

title: ollama-n8n-node
summary: Official n8n node for Ollama enabling low-code LLM workflows.

title: ollama-dagger
summary: Dagger module that spins up Ollama containers for CI/CD pipelines.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Helm chart for deploying Ollama on Kubernetes with GPU support.

title: ollama-rust
summary: Community Rust crate for interacting with the Ollama API.

title: ollama-elixir
summary: Elixir wrapper for Ollama using Finch HTTP client.

title: ollama-gpt4all-ui
summary: GPT4All chat UI that added Ollama backend support for local model serving.
